nodes.label: Rahul Bhaumik Research
nodes.description: Research at the intersection of human-computer interaction, soft interfaces, smart textiles, sensing, interaction design, fabrication, and design pedagogy.

nodes.label: Soft Interfaces
nodes.description: Designing flexible, deformable, and material-driven interfaces for embodied interaction.

nodes.label: Smart Textiles
nodes.description: Textile-based interaction systems using sensing, embroidery, knitting, conductive yarns, and soft material structures.

nodes.label: Inductive Sensing
nodes.description: Exploring inductive sensing for deformation-aware, soft, and 3D-printed interactive structures.

nodes.label: 3D-Printed Sensors
nodes.description: Using 3D printing, lattice structures, and functional materials to create sensor-enabled interactive objects.

nodes.label: Surface Gestures
nodes.description: Investigating touch, gesture, and surface-based interaction on textile and deformable interfaces.

nodes.label: Automotive HCI
nodes.description: Designing novel in-car interaction systems and interfaces for improved user experience.

nodes.label: Tangible Interaction
nodes.description: Creating physical, material, and embodied interfaces that support richer forms of interaction.

nodes.label: Design Pedagogy
nodes.description: Research on design learning, creativity, design thinking, and pedagogical tools.

nodes.label: XR and Virtual Environments
nodes.description: Exploring immersive and virtual environments for design, interaction, accessibility, and learning.

nodes.label: InSense3D: Designing Smart 3D-Printed Structures Leveraging Ferromagnetic Filaments for Inductive Deformation Sensing
nodes.description: A design and sensing approach for creating smart 3D-printed structures using ferromagnetic filaments and inductive deformation sensing.

nodes.label: Inductive Pressure Sensors Using 3D-Printed Structures With Tunable Stiffness
nodes.description: A sensing approach using 3D-printed structures with tunable stiffness for pressure-sensitive interaction.

nodes.label: Flexible and Compressible 3D-Printed Hybrid Structures Using Magnetically Detectable PETG for Inductive Sensing
nodes.description: A study on flexible and compressible 3D-printed hybrid structures using magnetically detectable thermoplastic materials for inductive sensing.

nodes.label: Interaction with a 3D Surface for an Innovative Input Experience on a Central Console
nodes.description: A study on interaction with a three-dimensional surface for automotive central console input.

nodes.label: A Gamified Model of Design Thinking for Fostering Learning in Children
nodes.description: A gamified design-thinking model for supporting learning and creativity among children.

nodes.label: An Intelligent Virtual Environment for Designers with Reduced Motor Abilities
nodes.description: A virtual environment intended to support designers with reduced motor abilities.
